title: DailyLog
description: The full cumulative rolling log for a single calendar day (today-log.json). Entries are appended chronologically across the four daily session checkpoints.

date.description: ISO date string (YYYY-MM-DD) for the day this log covers.

status.description: 'active' while the day is in progress; 'archived' after finalize_day() runs.

entries.description: Array of NarrativeEntry objects in chronological order (oldest first, newest last).

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent write to this log.

archivedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when this log was archived. Null while status is 'active'.
